name: Atlas Rise
objective: Hold the summit core behind three rings for four double-wave nights

stronghold.name: Atlas Rise
stronghold.blurb: A mountainhold behind three concentric wall rings — L1, L2, L3 — under snow, ice and a patient siege.

intro.title: Atlas Rise
lines: Three rings of wall climb the mountain; the gates never line up.
Ice glazes the slopes — your boots and theirs slide alike.
Atlas built this hold. Hold it, and Atlas marches with you.

outro.title: The Mountain Stands
lines: Four dawns and the inner ring never broke.
Atlas shoulders the gate beam back into place and nods.
